# Contributing

> **TorrentPier 3.0 (Ox) is the final release of this codebase.** The project
> closed in May 2026. No further patches, security fixes, or feature work
> are planned.

## Are you accepting contributions?

**No.** Pull requests will not be reviewed or merged. The repository remains
public as a historical reference and as a base for self-hosted operators who
want to run or fork the code.

A new generation of the engine — codename **Dexter** — is being written from
scratch, expected in 2027.

## What you can still do

- **Read the closure announcement**: full context lives at
  <https://sunset.torrentpier.com/>.
- **Report a security issue**: see [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md). Reports are
  accepted as a courtesy but will not be patched; you are expected to apply
  your own mitigations.
- **Open a discussion**: GitHub Issues remain open as a low-noise channel.
  There is no commitment to respond.
- **Browse the community archive**: the original forum is preserved
  read-only at <https://ox.torrentpier.com/>.
- **Fork the code**: the MIT license permits free use, modification, and
  redistribution. If you maintain a fork, you are responsible for its
  security and upkeep.

## Code of Conduct

The [Code of Conduct](CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md) still applies to all remaining
community spaces for as long as they stay open.
